subject: [INFRA] Add status healthcheck to xtesting
commit_message:
[INFRA] Add status healthcheck to xtesting

Added status healthcheck to xtesting

Issue-ID: INT-2240
Signed-off-by: pawel.denst <pawel.denst@external.t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: Ie0d5c87114d529ca86574019af7f3be60fc8c679

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/220/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/220/ )
